title: raoulia australis
intro: Raoulia australis, also known as the Silver Fern, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, native to New Zealand and parts of Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Raoulia australis include its potential to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture, tea, or poultice, and has also been used in herbal medicine to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
